goalInput.title: What do you want to achieve?
goalInput.description: Describe your goal and our AI will help you break it down into an actionable plan.
goalInput.placeholder: e.g., Move from Berlin to Lisbon within 6 months
goalInput.examplesLabel: Or try one of these examples:

examples.move: Move from Berlin to Lisbon within 6 months
examples.mvp: Launch an MVP for my SaaS product
examples.marathon: Train for and complete a half marathon
examples.trip: Plan a 2-week trip to Japan on a budget
examples.novel: Write and self-publish a fiction novel

errorDisplay.defaultMessage: Something went wrong while processing your goal. Please try again.

vagueGoalRejection.title: Goal needs more detail
vagueGoalRejection.suggestionsLabel: Try one of these more specific goals:

questionForm.helpUnderstand: Help us understand your goal better by answering these questions.
questionForm.answerFollowUp: Answer follow-up questions to improve your board, or generate now.

detailPage.loadError: Could not load this goal. It may not exist or you may not have access.

newPage.aiTimeout: Our AI is taking longer than expected. Please try again.
newPage.genericError: Something went wrong while processing your goal. Please try again.

stream.connectionLost: Connection lost. Your board may have been partially created.
